td.div:
View and delete message queued for delivery. Each line in the report shows a batch of messages for a FYI queued for delivery.
To delete a batch click the "X" icon. The batch will be dequeued and not be delivered.
When a batch of messages is deleted and dequeued, the appropriate number of simplyfyi UNITS will be credited back to your account. The adjustment can be viewed in the "Manage Your Account" menu under Usage.
